data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida on April 30, 2026, it was reported that the Contract Research Organization (CRO) Services Market is expected to increase from approximately USD 93.02 billion in 2026 to USD 140.32 billion by 2031, representing a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.6%. data.title: From Tel Aviv to Austin: 5W Research Documents 80+ Israeli Technology Companies Establishing U.S. Operations in Texas Since 2020 -- Cybersecurity, AI, Defense, and Energy Categories Lead the Migration
data.description: 5W's latest research unveils the initial comprehensive map of Israeli tech migration to Texas, showcasing companies like Wiz, SentinelOne, Pagaya, Salt Security, and Hippo as they set up U.S. bases in Austin, Dallas, and Houston. The report, out of New York on April 30, 2026, marks a significant milestone in tracking this trend.

data.title: Synchrony Expands Partnership with Lowe's as New Issuer of Co-Brand Credit Card for Home Improvement Professionals
data.description: A new credit card, MyLowe's Pro Rewards American Express® Card, has been launched today to assist professional customers in maximizing rewards and savings at Lowe's and on everyday business transactions. The card is provided by Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a prominent consumer financing company. The release was announced in Stamford, Conn., on April 30, 2026.

data.title: Benjamin Moore Announces Two New Subsidiaries Poised to Grow Global Markets
data.description: Montvale, New Jersey-based Benjamin Moore, a leading brand in high-quality paint and coatings with over 140 years of experience, has revealed the launch of two new wholly owned subsidiaries - BM Prudhoe Limited and C&R Scotland Limited. These entities, situated in England and Scotland, represent the company's continued growth in the UK and globally. This move signifies Benjamin Moore's second subsidiary in England and its inaugural subsidiary in Scotland. The introduction of these subsidiaries further solidifies the company's foothold in international markets.

data.title: Ingles Markets Announces Preliminary Voting Results from 2026 Annual Meeting
data.description: As per the recent announcement by Ingles Markets, Incorporated, two new Class A directors, Dwight Jacobs and Rory Held, were elected at the 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders. Additionally, Fred D. Ayers, Robert P. Ingle II, Patricia E. Jackson, James W. Lanning, Laura Ingle Sharp, and Brenda S. Tudor were elected as Class B directors. Shareholders also approved the compensation plans in an advisory vote. Ingles Markets is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol IMKTA.

data.title: StarTech.com Launches Industry-First USB4 Dock with Driverless Dual Display for Mac, Windows, and Linux
data.description: In London, ON, as of April 30, 2026, StarTech.com, a leading worldwide supplier of high-performance connectivity products for IT professionals, has introduced the Driverless Dual 4K USB4 Universal Docking Station (208N-USB4-DOCK). This groundbreaking product sets a new industry standard by offering driverless connectivity.

data.title: Fujifilm to Demonstrate its Leading-Edge Endoscopic Imaging Innovations at the Digestive Disease Week (DDW®) 2026 Conference
data.description: A company based in Lexington, Massachusetts, FUJIFILM Healthcare Americas Corporation, known for providing endoscopic imaging and endosurgical solutions, will exhibit its groundbreaking advancements in endoscopic imaging at the 2026 Digestive Disease Week (DDW®) annual meeting in Chicago, IL from May 3-5. The ELUXEO® 8000 Endoscopic Imaging System, launched recently, will be unveiled at the event, highlighting Fujifilm's leadership in endoscopic LED multi-light technology in the United States.

data.title: KBRA Releases Research – The Forward Look—U.S. Credit Insights: Q2 2026
data.description: A recent report from KBRA in New York delves into the views of Chief Strategist Van Hesser regarding crucial economic indicators and the driving forces behind credit markets in the next quarter. The report evaluates current and projected market conditions and analyzes credit market valuations. Despite challenges, including shocks, the report identifies resilient U.S. economic and corporate earnings growth as key drivers for credit markets in Q2. This analysis sheds light on important factors influencing the market, aiding in decision-making processes.

data.title: Pouches Aren't Cutting It as Cell Phone Bans Surge - Vaultz® Delivers a Secure, High Capacity Solution for Schools Nationwide
data.description: The PB132, developed by Victor Technology in Bolingbrook, Illinois, offers a new solution amid the nationwide trend of cell phone bans in schools. With a growing number of states implementing phone-free learning policies, the PB132 provides an alternative to pouches and similar options. This innovation comes at a time when many schools have been seeking alternatives to address the challenges posed by widespread cellphone use.

data.title: Functionize Appoints Silicon Valley Executive Alan Naumann as Chairman to Accelerate Market Leadership
data.description: On April 30, 2026, in San Francisco, Functionize revealed Alan Naumann as the new Chairman of the Board of Directors as the company moves into its next growth phase. With over 30 years of experience in executive roles, Naumann's appointment signals Functionize's strategic advancement in the industry.

data.title: GREAT AMERICAN MEDIA BEGINS PRODUCTION ON SEASON 2, ORIGINAL SERIES, 'CROSSROAD SPRINGS,' AS AUDIENCE MOMENTUM BUILDS ACROSS ALL PLATFORMS
data.description: Great American Media has revealed that Season Two of its Original Series, "Crossroad Springs," will be available for streaming on Great American Pure Flix in Fall 2026. The season is set to premiere on Great American Family and GFAM+ at the same time. The announcement was made on April 30, 2026, in New York City. Production for the new season is currently in progress.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- The Polo Club Foundation/
data.description: The Polo Club Foundation in Boca Raton, Florida, has recently distributed over $165,000 in grants to ten local charities aimed at addressing community needs. The foundation awarded the funds to support the work of nonprofit organizations that are dedicated to serving the community. This initiative demonstrates the foundation's commitment to making a positive impact and offering financial assistance to those striving to meet the needs of the society. The grants are expected to enhance the efforts of these charities in making a difference in the local community.
